message:
fix(core): repair resize_invariants clippy and compile issues

- Replace log::warn with tracing::warn (frankenterm-core uses tracing, not log)
- Replace map_or with map_or_else for clippy::or_fun_call compliance
- Reformat resize_scheduler.rs imports (auto-formatter)
